pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used in the codebase.
Ensures consistency with the compiler settings and signals the intended runtime environment for the application.

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for modern Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.why_exists: Paths.get() is deprecated for removal in Java 21, causing deprecation warnings and potential future compilation failures.

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Update import statement to use Path instead of Paths.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.why_exists: Paths class is deprecated for removal in Java 21, requiring import update to Path.

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
